calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

MARK HUDAK, Esq. appeared for plaintiff ONE SOURCE PLUMBING,INC., who was not present at today's hearing, REPRESENTED BY VINCENT SABASTIANO
No appearance by defendant TROPHY PROPERTIES 1 DE, LLC.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff ONE SOURCE PLUMBING, INC., and against the Defaulted Defendant TROPHY PORPERTIES 1 DE, LLC as follows:

DAMAGES $6070.; PREJUDMT INT 10% $1059. FOR A TOTAL $7129.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
